title: Biome O' Plenty Rose Quartz For Create
description: Adds recipes to makes Create's polished rose quartz using the chunks from Biomes O' Plenty
body:
A very simple datapack that adds a few recipes so you can create Create's polished rose quartz using the rose quartz chunks from Biomes O' Plently. No more tedious redstone quartz crafting!

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/rUHNOdeG/images/019447e11201b410b81f985f52dbd6d6ca78d54f.png)

This pack adds sanding recipes for: base Create (sandpaper), DnDesires (industrial fan), and Vintage Grinder Edition. It also works with recipes that copy base Create's sanding like deployers using sandpaper or enchantment industry's grindstone. 1.0.1 added support for Create Vintage (full mod) and Ratatouille Fried Delights.

I'm making this since I was unable to find any datapacks that adds all of these recipes while also being available for 1.21.1
